---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the problem, not the solution. Who is affected? How often? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What would you build? How would it work? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about and why did you reject them? -->

## Is this in the Roadmap?

<!-- Check ROADMAP.md — does this fit a planned phase, or is it new? -->
- [ ] Yes — Phase ___
- [ ] No — this is a new proposal

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read WHITEPAPER.md and this feature is consistent with BSC's design principles
- [ ] This feature does not weaken access logging or citizen notification
- [ ] This feature does not introduce raw Aadhaar/PAN storage
- [ ] This feature does not add cryptocurrency, tokens, or gas fees
- [ ] I am willing to contribute a PR for this feature
